name: Too Easy Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate by placing it in a microwavable dish. Microwave on HIGH for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring after each minute. Remove from microwave.
2. Stir until completely melted.
3. Beat the cream cheese until smooth.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating until well blended.
5. Add the melted chocolate and vanilla; mix well.
6. Refrigerate about 1 hour.
7. Shape into 1-inch balls.
8. Roll in nuts or coconut.
9. Store in refrigerator. Makes about 5 dozen truffles.
Variation: To flavor truffles with liqueurs, omit vanilla. Divide truffle mixture into thirds. Add 1 tablespoon liqueur (almond, coffee, or orange) to each third mixture; mix well.
